{
  "task_plan": [
    {
      "task_id": "task_07_privilege_isolation",
      "question_ids": ["Q07_001", "Q07_002", "Q07_003", "Q07_004", "Q07_012"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "查证特权级隔离形态、凭证/权限数据结构、syscall路径权限检查、检查链路及UID/GID字段在syscall路径上的执行证据。需要找到security_state定义、enforcement_callsite实现体、deny_or_fault_path调用点、policy_scope范围，并完成negative_search_coverage。",
      "group_reason": "这5题共享同一实现链路：特权级隔离、凭证数据结构、权限检查执行、检查链路和UID/GID字段检查，均围绕security_state和enforcement_callsite展开。",
      "query": "搜索security、capability、uid、perm、auth相关目录和符号，使用rag_search_code和grep_in_repo定位关键文件，再用lsp_get_definition和read_code_segment读取实现体，追踪syscall路径上的权限检查调用点。",
      "seed_paths": ["security", "capability", "uid", "perm", "auth", "include/fs", "include/mm", "include/sync", "kernel/fs", "kernel/mm", "kernel/sync", "kernel/trap", "kernel/syscall"],
      "entry_symbols": ["sys_getuid", "cap", "permission", "check_perm", "_start", "start"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "call_site", "usage_flow", "negative_search"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_07_user_ptr_verify",
      "question_ids": ["Q07_005"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "查证用户指针验证机制（access_ok/verify_area/UserInPtr/copyin/copyout）是否实现。需要找到定义、实现体、调用点，并完成negative_search_coverage。",
      "group_reason": "该题独立，涉及用户指针验证，与权限检查链路不同。",
      "query": "搜索access_ok、verify_area、UserInPtr、copyin、copyout等关键词，使用rag_search_code和grep_in_repo定位，再用lsp_get_definition和read_code_segment读取实现体，追踪调用点。",
      "seed_paths": ["kernel", "mm", "include", "arch"],
      "entry_symbols": ["access_ok", "verify_area", "UserInPtr", "copyin", "copyout"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "call_site", "usage_flow", "negative_search"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_07_seccomp_sandbox",
      "question_ids": ["Q07_006"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "查证seccomp/prctl/sandbox等系统调用过滤/沙箱机制是否实现。需要找到定义、实现体、调用点，并完成negative_search_coverage。",
      "group_reason": "该题独立，涉及系统调用过滤/沙箱，与权限检查链路不同。",
      "query": "搜索seccomp、prctl、sandbox等关键词，使用rag_search_code和grep_in_repo定位，再用lsp_get_definition和read_code_segment读取实现体，追踪调用点。",
      "seed_paths": ["kernel", "security", "syscall", "include"],
      "entry_symbols": ["seccomp", "prctl", "sandbox"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "call_site", "usage_flow", "negative_search"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_07_stack_protection",
      "question_ids": ["Q07_007", "Q07_015"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "查证栈保护/溢出防护（stack canary/guard page）及缓冲区溢出防护（stack canary/guard page/NX-W^X/ASLR/bounds check）是否实现。需要找到定义、实现体、调用点，并完成negative_search_coverage。",
      "group_reason": "这2题共享同一实现线索：栈保护和缓冲区溢出防护，均涉及stack canary、guard page、NX/W^X等机制。",
      "query": "搜索stack_chk、stack canary、__stack_chk_fail、guard page、NX、W^X、noexec、ASLR、randomize、bounds check、FORTIFY、overflow等关键词，使用rag_search_code和grep_in_repo定位，再用lsp_get_definition和read_code_segment读取实现体，追踪调用点。",
      "seed_paths": ["kernel", "mm", "memory", "arch", "security", "build", "linker", "include", "os"],
      "entry_symbols": ["__stack_chk_fail", "guard_page", "nx", "wx", "aslr", "randomize"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "call_site", "usage_flow", "negative_search"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_07_audit_secureboot",
      "question_ids": ["Q07_008"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "查证审计/安全启动（audit/secure boot/signature）相关逻辑是否实现。需要找到定义、实现体、调用点，并完成negative_search_coverage。",
      "group_reason": "该题独立，涉及审计/安全启动，与权限检查链路不同。",
      "query": "搜索audit、secure boot、signature等关键词，使用rag_search_code和grep_in_repo定位，再用lsp_get_definition和read_code_segment读取实现体，追踪调用点。",
      "seed_paths": ["kernel", "security", "boot", "include"],
      "entry_symbols": ["audit", "secure_boot", "signature"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "call_site", "usage_flow", "negative_search"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_07_arch_support",
      "question_ids": ["Q07_009"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "查证项目支持的架构（riscv64/aarch64/x86_64/loongarch64）及每种架构的安全相关初始化（特权级配置、PMP/MPU/SMEP等）。需要逐架构找到支持证据和安全初始化证据，并完成negative_search_coverage。",
      "group_reason": "该题独立，涉及架构支持，与权限检查链路不同。",
      "query": "搜索riscv64、aarch64、x86_64、loongarch64、PMP、MPU、SMEP、SMAP、KPTI等关键词，使用rag_search_code和grep_in_repo定位，再用lsp_get_definition和read_code_segment读取实现体，追踪调用点。",
      "seed_paths": ["kernel", "security", "fs", "proc", "mm", "syscall", "arch", "include", "Makefile", "Cargo.toml"],
      "entry_symbols": ["riscv64", "aarch64", "x86_64", "loongarch64", "PMP", "MPU", "SMEP", "SMAP", "KPTI"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "call_site", "usage_flow", "negative_search"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_07_rust_raii",
      "question_ids": ["Q07_010"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "查证Rust RAII/所有权/生命周期相关的内核安全机制（如不可unsafe直接访问用户内存、锁的RAII自动释放等）是否实现。需要找到定义、实现体、调用点，并完成negative_search_coverage。",
      "group_reason": "该题独立，涉及Rust语言安全机制，与权限检查链路不同。",
      "query": "搜索RAII、unsafe、所有权、生命周期等关键词，使用rag_search_code和grep_in_repo定位，再用lsp_get_definition和read_code_segment读取实现体，追踪调用点。",
      "seed_paths": ["kernel", "include", "src"],
      "entry_symbols": ["RAII", "unsafe", "Ownership", "Lifetime"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "call_site", "usage_flow", "negative_search"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_07_kpti",
      "question_ids": ["Q07_011"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "查证内核/用户页表隔离（KPTI或等价机制）是否实现。需要找到定义、实现体、调用点，并完成negative_search_coverage。",
      "group_reason": "该题独立，涉及页表隔离，与权限检查链路不同。",
      "query": "搜索KPTI、PMP、SMEP、SMAP、TTBR0、TTBR1等关键词，使用rag_search_code和grep_in_repo定位，再用lsp_get_definition和read_code_segment读取实现体，追踪调用点。",
      "seed_paths": ["kernel", "mm", "arch", "include"],
      "entry_symbols": ["KPTI", "PMP", "SMEP", "SMAP", "TTBR0", "TTBR1"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "call_site", "usage_flow", "negative_search"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_07_access_control_model",
      "question_ids": ["Q07_013"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "查证访问控制模型（DAC/MAC/RBAC/ACL/capability）的类型。需要找到subject_identity_model、object_permission_model、enforcement_path、model_classification的证据，并完成negative_search_coverage。",
      "group_reason": "该题独立，涉及访问控制模型分类，与权限检查链路不同。",
      "query": "搜索DAC、MAC、RBAC、ACL、capability、uid、gid、mode、owner、permission、access control、EACCES、EPERM等关键词，使用rag_search_code和grep_in_repo定位，再用lsp_get_definition和read_code_segment读取实现体，追踪调用点。",
      "seed_paths": ["kernel", "security", "fs", "proc", "syscall", "include"],
      "entry_symbols": ["DAC", "MAC", "RBAC", "ACL", "capability", "uid", "gid", "mode", "owner", "permission"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "call_site", "usage_flow", "negative_search"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_07_integrity_policy",
      "question_ids": ["Q07_014"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "查证完整性策略（Biba模型、只读内核段、代码签名验证、W^X内存保护等）是否实现。需要找到定义、实现体、调用点，并完成negative_search_coverage。",
      "group_reason": "该题独立，涉及完整性策略，与权限检查链路不同。",
      "query": "搜索Biba、integrity、read-only、code signature、W^X等关键词，使用rag_search_code和grep_in_repo定位，再用lsp_get_definition和read_code_segment读取实现体，追踪调用点。",
      "seed_paths": ["kernel", "security", "mm", "include"],
      "entry_symbols": ["Biba", "integrity", "read_only", "code_signature", "W^X"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "call_site", "usage_flow", "negative_search"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_07_hardening_maintenance",
      "question_ids": ["Q07_016"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "查证系统硬化与安全维护措施（服务裁剪、权限最小化、审计日志、备份/恢复、补丁/版本策略）是否实现。需要找到service_minimization、least_privilege_defaults、security_audit_logging、backup_or_recovery_policy、patch_or_signature_policy的证据，并完成negative_search_coverage。",
      "group_reason": "该题独立，涉及系统硬化与维护，与权限检查链路不同。",
      "query": "搜索hardening、audit、log、secure boot、signature、service、daemon、backup、archive、patch、version、config、capability、least privilege等关键词，使用rag_search_code和grep_in_repo定位，再用lsp_get_definition和read_code_segment读取实现体，追踪调用点。",
      "seed_paths": ["kernel", "security", "config", "scripts", "tools", "README.md", "docs", "os"],
      "entry_symbols": ["hardening", "audit", "log", "secure_boot", "signature", "service", "daemon", "backup", "archive", "patch", "version", "config", "capability", "least_privilege"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "call_site", "usage_flow", "negative_search"]
    }
  ]
}
